auth.descLogin: Sign in to access your recordings and sheets on any device.
auth.descRegister: Save your recordings and sheets to the cloud.
auth.switchLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.resetSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.

error.weakPassword: Password is too weak (6 characters minimum).
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

gallery.notLoggedIn: Sign in to save and replay your recordings
gallery.title: My Recordings

recording.cloudNotice: Sign in to save this recording to your library. You can still export it as an MP3.

sheet.title: Sheet
sheet.placeholder:
Paste your sheet here…
e.g. asdf [gh] j|k l
sheet.helpIntro: Here is how to write or interpret Pocket Piano sheets:
sheet.syntaxArpeggio: Play the sequence at fastest possible speed
sheet.syntaxQuick: Play notes one after the other quickly
sheet.syntaxNormal: Play each note after a short pause
sheet.syntaxPauseMedium: Long pause for '|' with one extra space
sheet.syntaxPauseLong: Longer pause for '|' with 2 extra spaces
sheet.syntaxPauseLongest: Longest pause for 2 '|' with an extra space

onboarding.keyboardHint: Your computer keyboard plays the notes — try pressing A, S, D, F. Hold Shift for sharps.
onboarding.recordHint: Record your takes here, then replay or export them as MP3.
onboarding.sheetHint: Practice with follow-along sheets: load one and play the highlighted keys.

library.noRecordings: No recordings yet. Head to the piano to create one.

account.title: Account
account.deleteHint: Permanently deletes your account. Your recordings and sheets stay in the database unless deleted first.
account.deleteRecentLogin: For security, sign in again and retry.
account.deleteError: Could not delete the account. Please try again.

concept.title: Concept & Development
concept.desc: Built with a passion for sound and minimalist interfaces.

design.title: Design
design.desc: Pocket Piano aims for a calm, focused interface where the instrument is the hero.

mentions.title: 1. Legal Mentions
mentions.editorDesc: Pocket Piano is an independent project.
mentions.hostingDesc: The site is hosted by Firebase (Google Cloud Platform)

privacy.title: 2. Privacy Policy (GDPR)
privacy.desc: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), Pocket Piano collects only the data necessary to operate the service.
privacy.email: Email address (via authentication, for account sync).
privacy.stats: Your saved recordings, sheets and settings.
privacy.purposesDesc: Data is used exclusively to sync your settings, recordings and sheets across devices. No data is shared with third parties.
privacy.rightsDesc: You have a right of access, rectification and deletion of your data. You can delete your account at any time from the Account page.

intellectual.title: 3. Intellectual Property
intellectual.desc: All elements constituting this site (structure, design, logos, sounds) are the exclusive property of their creators, unless otherwise stated.
